author: System Migration
topic: SysEx and Tempo Bugs in Controller Script
context: Diagnosing bridge failure and tempo scaling bugs.
observation: SysEx needs OnSysEx callback in modern FL builds. midi.REC_Updated was replaced by REC_UpdateValue. REC_FromMIDI breaks raw tempo scaling.
result: Code refactored to support both OnMidiMsg and OnSysEx. Tempo scaling fixed by dropping REC_FromMIDI flag.
known_pitfalls: Virtual MIDI ports with duplicate I/O directions confuse midiOutSysex(). Stale controller deployments.
next_recommended_action: Strictly separate MIDI ports (RX input only, TX output only).
